LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.description: Create Whitespring megaturrets: Kontarion, Onager and Palintone, as well as their ammunition.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.label: Defesas da Primavera Branca
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.description: Craft powerful Whitespring mortar shells, such as shrapnel, armor piercing and cluster.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.label: Soluções de guerra de Whitespring
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteDemolition.label: Whitespring war solutions
LanguageData.VFEE_JanissaryGear.description: Craft heavy trooper armor, light powered armor that’s commonly used by Whitespring recon troops. Note that these also require advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.description: Construa decoração presidencial como tapetes Whitespring, espelhos, grandes cadeiras, lajes Whitespring, candelabros e muito mais.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.label: decoração presidencial
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.description: Construa uma cadeira presidencial adequada para altos funcionários de Whitespring e seus deveres cerimoniais.
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.label: cadeira de mesa presidencial
